response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:15: Juufuutei Raden performs a 3D live cover of 'Around The World'. Identified as the ATC version. Lyrics found online. 2. 02:15-02:30: Breaking news announcement about a National Gallery collaboration. 3. 02:30-02:51: Raden sings a song featuring promotional imagery for the collaboration. 4. 02:51-05:00: Raden talks about the collaboration. No lyrics for the second song found as it seems to be part of a promotional montage.
response.global_summary: The video is a 3D live performance by hololive VTuber 儒烏風亭らでん (Juufuutei Raden). She performs a cover of the song 'Around The World' (originally by the Eurodance group ATC, which itself is a cover of 'Pesenka' by Ruki Vverh!). Following the performance, there is a segment announcing a collaboration between Raden and the National Gallery in London, followed by a product demonstration of the collaboration goods.

scenes.description: Juufuutei Raden performs a 3D dance and vocal cover of 'Around The World' on a stage with changing backgrounds of famous world locations.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
The kisses of the sun were sweet I didn't blink
I let it in my eyes like an exotic drink
The radio playing songs that I have never heard
I don't know what to say. Oh, not another word

Just la la la la la
It goes around the world
Just la la la la la
It's all around the world
Just la la la la la
And everybody singin' la la la la la
And now the bells are ringin' la la la la la

Inside an empty room my inspiration flows
Now wait to hear, the tune around my head it goes
The magic melody you want to sing with me
Just la la la la la, the music is the key

And now the night is gone still it goes on and on
So deep inside of me, I long to set it free
I don't know what to do, just can't explain to you
I don't know what to say. Oh, not another word

Just la la la la la
It goes around the world
Just la la la la la
It's all around the world
Just la la la la la
And everybody singin' la la la la la
And now the bells are ringin' la la la la la

scenes.description: A special breaking news announcement segment reveals the collaboration between Juufuutei Raden and the National Gallery, London.
Raden performs another song while showcasing the artwork and collaboration goods. Text indicates 'When Raden Meets Art'.
Raden speaks directly to the audience, expressing her excitement about the collaboration.
